prompt: Generate Tesla home page screenshot with a clean, minimalist interface, displayed on a tablet. Use the black and white color palette and overall composition from the reference image, placed against a subtle background.
prompt_refined: Generate a Tesla home page screenshot featuring a clean, minimalist interface, displayed prominently on a black tablet. The tablet is positioned similarly to image 1, viewed from a slightly elevated, close-up angle, dominating the foreground. The screen's layout should emulate the composition of image 1, including a brand logo (Tesla) on the top-left, navigation links on the top-right, and a large, centrally aligned headline. The color scheme must be a strict black and white grayscale, with high-contrast elements and typography, directly inspired by image 1's palette. The overall scene should be set against a soft, light grey, subtly blurred background.
objects: Black tablet (dominating the foreground, viewed from a slightly elevated, close-up angle)
Tesla home page screenshot (on the tablet screen)
Tesla brand logo (on the top-left of the screenshot)
Navigation links (on the top-right of the screenshot)
Large, centrally aligned headline (on the screenshot)
Black and white grayscale color scheme (of the screenshot, with high-contrast elements and typography)
Soft, light grey, subtly blurred background
